style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" value="FFmpeg decode → 逐幀 numpy

1. 場地偵測 (court_model, conf≥0.8)
 → Homography + 14 關鍵點
 → draw_court()

2. Pose 偵測 (yolo26n-pose)
 → 上/下方球員位置 + 手腕座標
 → draw_skeleton()

3. Ball 偵測 (BallTracker)
 → 靜止黑名單 + 跳躍過濾

4. 滑動窗口 process_window()
 → 離群過濾 + 插值 → 定案

5. 回合感知繪製 → FFmpeg encode" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="230" x="1110" y="1085" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3_prog1" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=10;" value="progress_cb(done, total)
→ sess["progress"] 0-95%"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1240" y="1260" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="680" y="1260" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3_phase2" parent="1" style="shape=umlFrame;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;width=260;height=18;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1;" value="<b>階段 2: 事件偵測+球速 (95-97%)</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="460" x="1100" y="1280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3_note_p2" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" value="detect_events → contacts + bounces

_build_messages:

backend → vllm:8005" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="300" x="30" y="3280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend2" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="<b>圖例</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="200" x="360" y="3280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_sync" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;rounded=0;fontSize=10;" value="同步請求 →"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="370" y="3320" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="3320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_async" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;dashed=1;rounded=0;fontSize=10;" value="回應/非同步 -->"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="370" y="3350" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="3350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_loop_text" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=10;" value="loop = 重複區塊

opt = 可選區塊
par = 並行區塊" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="370" y="3360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
FFmpeg decode → 逐幀 numpy
1. 場地偵測 (court_model, conf≥0.8)
→ Homography + 14 關鍵點
→ draw_court()
2. Pose 偵測 (yolo26n-pose)
→ 上/下方球員位置 + 手腕座標
→ draw_skeleton()
3. Ball 偵測 (BallTracker)
→ 靜止黑名單 + 跳躍過濾
4. 滑動窗口 process_window()
→ 離群過濾 + 插值 → 定案
5. 回合感知繪製 → FFmpeg encode

div.div:
網路流向
外部 → Cloudflare Tunnel → frontend:3000
/api/* → backend:8000 (Next.js rewrite)
/videos/* → backend:8000 (Next.js rewrite)
backend → mysql:3306
backend → vllm:8005
